name: Statue of Cecil John Rhodes
description: Bronze statue of Cecil John Rhodes seated on a horse, located in Company's Garden, Cape Town.
source: Wikipedia / Statue of Cecil John Rhodes

name: Statue of Jan van Riebeeck
description: Bronze statue of Jan van Riebeeck, the Dutch colonial administrator who founded Cape Town, located on Heerengracht, Cape Town.
source: Wikipedia / Statue of Jan van Riebeeck

name: Nelson Mandela Statue (Johannesburg)
description: 9-meter bronze statue of Nelson Mandela standing on the balcony of Johannesburg City Hall, where he gave his first public speech after release from prison.

name: Mahatma Gandhi Statue
description: Statue of Mahatma Gandhi located in Gandhi Square, Johannesburg, commemorating his time in South Africa.

name: Shaka Zulu Statue
description: Bronze statue of King Shaka Zulu on the Durban beachfront, overlooking the Indian Ocean.

name: Steve Biko Statue
description: Statue of anti-apartheid activist Steve Biko located in Grahamstown (Makhanda), Eastern Cape.

name: Statue of J.B.M. Hertzog
description: Statue of former Prime Minister James Barry Munnik Hertzog in Bloemfontein, Free State.

name: Statue of C.F. Swart
description: Statue of C.F. Swart, first State President of the Republic of South Africa, located in Bloemfontein.

name: Statue of Louis Botha
description: Equestrian statue of General Louis Botha, first Prime Minister of the Union of South Africa, located in Pretoria.

name: Jan Smuts Statue
description: Statue of Jan Smuts, South African statesman and military leader, located near the Union Buildings in Pretoria.

name: Statue of Andries Pretorius
description: Statue of Andries Pretorius, leader of the Voortrekkers, located in Church Square, Pretoria.

name: Statue of Sir George Grey
description: Statue of Sir George Grey, Governor of the Cape Colony, located in Cape Town.

name: Paul Kruger Statue
description: Bronze statue of Paul Kruger, President of the South African Republic, located at Kruger Gate near Hazyview.

name: Queen Victoria Statue
description: Statue of Queen Victoria located in Pietermaritzburg, KwaZulu-Natal.

name: Queen Victoria Statue (Port Elizabeth)
description: Statue of Queen Victoria located in Port Elizabeth, Eastern Cape.
